error_signature: default google docs format is not suitable for opening
title: Google Docs format incompatible for download
symptom: When attempting to download a Google Docs file, the format is not suitable for opening in other applications, resulting in errors.
not_this_if: File is converted to a compatible format like PDF or MS Word
root_cause: The default format of Google Docs is a directory of multiple .xml files, which cannot be opened directly in most applications. To share or download the document, it needs to be converted to a more widely accepted format such as PDF or MS Word.
fix_steps: Enable the Google file conversion option in the download settings
Select a compatible format (e.g., PDF or MS Word)
Use the Telegram Send Document node with the binary data toggle enabled
agent_instruction: Ensure to convert the Google Docs file to a compatible format before downloading.
